# Changelog

All notable changes to `filament-collapsible-sidebar` will be documented in this file.

## 1.0.0 - 2025-12-04

### Added
- Initial release
- Collapsible sidebar with toggle button
- Icon-only view when collapsed
- State persistence with localStorage
- Dark mode support
- Smooth animations
- Desktop only (mobile hidden)
